g.style: font-size:8px; fill:rgb(45,45,45); text-rendering:optimizeLegibility; font-family:sans-serif; font-style:italic; stroke:rgb(45,45,45);

g.text: Maximum velocity shall not exceed 2.0 m/s in

g.style: font-size:8px; fill:rgb(45,45,45); text-rendering:optimizeLegibility; font-family:sans-serif; font-style:italic; stroke:rgb(45,45,45);

g.text: Operational endurance shall be at least 4 hours

g.style: font-size:8px; fill:rgb(45,45,45); text-rendering:optimizeLegibility; font-family:sans-serif; font-style:italic; stroke:rgb(45,45,45);

g.text: Total system mass shall not exceed 25 kg

g.style: font-size:8px; fill:rgb(45,45,45); text-rendering:optimizeLegibility; font-family:sans-serif; font-style:italic; stroke:rgb(45,45,45);

g.text: The robot shall halt all motion within 0.5 seconds
of receiving an emergency stop command.

g.style: font-size:8px; fill:rgb(45,45,45); text-rendering:optimizeLegibility; font-family:sans-serif; font-style:italic; stroke:rgb(45,45,45);

g.text: The robot shall maintain a minimum clearance of

g.style: font-size:8px; fill:rgb(45,45,45); text-rendering:optimizeLegibility; font-family:sans-serif; font-style:italic; stroke:rgb(45,45,45);

g.text: The robot shall detect human presence within
5 meters and reduce speed to 0.5 m/s.

g.style: font-size:8px; fill:rgb(45,45,45); text-rendering:optimizeLegibility; font-family:sans-serif; font-style:italic; stroke:rgb(45,45,45);

g.text: Upon loss of communication with the operator
station for more than 10 seconds, the robot

g.style: font-size:8px; fill:rgb(45,45,45); text-rendering:optimizeLegibility; font-family:sans-serif; font-style:italic; stroke:rgb(45,45,45);

g.text: Localization accuracy shall be within 5 cm RMS
